name: Richard M. Sherman
abstract: Richard Morton Sherman (June 12, 1928 – May 25, 2024) was an American songwriter who specialized in musical films with his brother Robert B. Sherman.

works_created.t: Mary Poppins: A Spoonful of Sugar
The Jungle Book: I Wanna Be Like You
The Jungle Book: I Wanna Be Like You

about_quotes.speaker: Chester Jones
about_quotes.evidence: INTERVIEWEE: Yeah, yeah, yeah, so many Jones. What else? Quite a number of Jones playing music. No, it's not related to me. Mm-hmm. I know Jones, I know playing music.
